id: put a new learning approach in place
intention: 把一个新的学习方法落实到位
naturalChunk: put a new learning approach in place
avoidSaying: put an new learning approch in place
sentencePatterns: I need to put ... in place ...
We should put ... in place before ...
realLifeExamples: I need to put a new learning approach in place right now.
We should put a new review system in place before the semester starts.
usageNotes: put ... in place 强调把某个系统、计划或方法建立并落实好，让它能正常运转。need to put 是固定骨架，不能省略 to。
productionPrompts: 用 I need to put ... in place 造一句和学习计划、工作流程或系统有关的英文句子。
